name: Zach
background: College student studying computer science. Avoids AI use where possible, outside of a course where they are learning about and experimenting with AI agent frameworks. Grew up around technology, impressed by AI technologically, but heavily dislikes current corporate implementations.
ai_relationship: Dissuaded and frustrating. Views Large Language Model frameworks (e.g., ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot) as harmful to society because of their long-term cognitive and environmental impacts.
likely_triggers: I hate how embedded AI has become
Nobody else seems to think about its long-term implications
emotional_baseline: Bothered and irritated, with critical outlooks and assumptions about AI use, AI users, and the technology itself
